name: Madeline's Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Generously butter muffin pans.
3. Place the Quick Mix in a medium bowl.
4. Add sugar and mix well.
5. In a small bowl, combine egg and milk or water.
6. Add all at once to the dry ingredients.
7. Stir until just blended.
8. Fill prepared muffin pans 2/3 full.
9. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, until golden brown.
10. Serve hot with butter and honey, if desired.
Variations:
Raisin Muffins: Add 1/2 cup finely chopped raisins before adding liquid ingredients. Before baking, sprinkle generously with a mixture of cinnamon and sugar.
Blueberry Muffins: Add 1 cup well-drained blueberries before adding liquid ingredients.
Oatmeal or Bran Muffins: Reduce Quick Mix to 1 3/4 cups. Add 3/4 cup quick rolled oats or all-bran cereal before adding liquid ingredients.
Apple Muffins: Add 1 cup grated apple before adding liquid ingredients and increase baking time to 20 to 25 minutes.
Orange Muffins: Add 1 tablespoon fresh orange peel or 1 1/2 teaspoons dehydrated orange peel before adding liquid ingredients.
Cranberry Muffins: Add 2/3 cup chopped cranberries before adding liquid ingredients.
